artifact_type: derivation | proof_attempt | counterexample | summary | mapping | test_plan
summary: Short summary of what was returned.
result: Bounded result. Do not overstate proof status.
claim_made: The strongest claim this artifact attempts to support.
cost_or_effort_note: Token, compute, review, or effort note if available.
open_gaps: Gap that remains after this artifact.
next_instruction_requested: Optional proposed next task. Must be reviewed before admission.
self_limitations: Limitation declared by the solver/model or reviewer.
